settings.editor:
You’re a dedicated leader in the AEC industry, determined to deliver projects on time, on budget, and with excellence. But your team is frustrated.

  • Every project manager uses different tools.
  • There’s no consistency.
  • Things fall through the cracks.
  • You’re left cleaning up the mess.
We understand how hard it is to keep project management aligned across an entire firm.
That’s why we created the AEC Project Management Toolkit, your guide to streamlined, consistent, and effective project delivery.

Here’s how it works:

Step 1: Equip your team with over 40 plug-and-play templates; go/no-go checklists, risk plans, earned value trackers, client feedback forms, and more, all specific to AEC projects.

Step 2: Stay current with quarterly updates and bi-annual webinars on best practices.

Step 3: Align the toolkit with your brand, we can customize templates with your logo, colors, or internal language.

Package includes:

  • Access to the full EMI AEC PM Toolkit Library of tools and templates.
  • Quarterly update depending on industry needs and changes to templates.

Package includes:

  • Everything in the General Package PLUS
  • EMI will rebrand all templates to align with your company's logo and colors.

Package includes:

  • Everything in the Company-Branded Package PLUS
  • Ten (10) virtual meetings with EMI per year to customize templates to your needs, colors and logos.
With the AEC Project Management Toolkit, your team gains clarity, operates consistently, and leads projects with confidence. You’ll stop reacting to problems and start proactively delivering success.

or...
fill out the form below to get more information.

metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: The AEC Project Management Toolkit helps your team stay aligned and deliver projects with clarity and consistency
metadata._yoast_wpseo_opengraph-description: Are you looking to streamline your project management process in the architecture, engineering, or construction industry? The AEC Project Management Toolkit from the Engineering Management Institute is filled with practical resources, proven strategies, and expert insights to help you lead your team to success. Whether you are an experienced manager or just starting out, this toolkit will empower you to deliver projects more efficiently and effectively. Explore it now and elevate your project management skills.
metadata._yoast_wpseo_twitter-description: Boost your AEC project success with the Project Management Toolkit from the Engineering Management Institute. Discover expert tips, templates, and strategies to manage your architecture, engineering, or construction projects more efficiently and effectively.
